01 · Research position

Project-funded postdoc

Full-time computational research associated with an active laboratory project.

02 · Independent funding

Postdoctoral fellowship

Develop a proposal with us for an AIRC or Marie Skłodowska-Curie fellowship.

03 · Yearly calls

PhD researcher

Funded doctoral research through ADSAI, SISSA or the National PhD in AI.

04 · Student project

MSc thesis

A substantial computational research project, usually developed with another laboratory member.

Example theses
05 · Student project

BSc project

A focused introduction to computational research in cancer genomics and data science.

06 · Flexible duration

Internship or research visit

Short research stays for students and visiting researchers from partner institutions.
